positive: A whimsical, stylized cosmic sloth wearing a miniature astronaut helmet, sitting on a crescent moon under a bioluminescent nebula sky. The sloth is surrounded by floating constellations made of deep purple and vibrant teal stardust. Highly detailed vector illustration style, reminiscent of celestial folklore artwork, perfect for a screen print. Strong chiaroscuro lighting emphasizing the silhouette of the sloth and the moon. Composition is centrally focused and symmetrical. Palette features deep blues, cosmic purples, metallic teal, and soft luminescence. High contrast, crisp lines, suitable for apparel art. Clean, graphic, minimalist yet detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, low resolution, grainy, noise, bad anatomy, multiple heads, extra limbs, sloppy, cartoonish, photorealism, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters
